Age_without_adverse_reactions.description: Ages of the 28 patients without major adverse reactions to SA. This variable and 'Age_with_adverse_reactions' represent the same measurement (age) for patients in different groups defined by adverse reaction status.

Age_with_adverse_reactions.description: Ages of the 37 patients with major adverse reactions to SA. This variable and 'Age_without_adverse_reactions' represent the same measurement (age) for patients in different groups defined by adverse reaction status.

Adverse_reaction_group.description: Grouping variable indicating whether patients experienced major adverse reactions to sodium aurothiomalate (SA).
